title: Getting your adult passport after you apply in Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Getting your passport after you apply
- You applied in person
- You’re moving but don’t have your passport yet
- When you get your passport

## You applied in person
When your passport is ready, we’ll mail it to you unless you paid for pickup service. This usually takes 5 business days, but it can vary across the country.
While you’re waiting for your passport, you can check the status of your application online (opens in a new tab) .
If you paid for pickup service, the pickup date will be indicated on your receipt.
You can send someone else to pick up your passport if they have
- valid identification and
- something in writing from you saying they’re allowed to
When your passport is ready, we’ll mail it to you. This usually takes 5 business days, but it can vary across the country.
Any original documents you submitted will be mailed back to you. They may be in a separate package from your passport.
While you’re waiting for your passport, you can check the status of your application online (opens in a new tab) .

## You’re moving but don’t have your passport yet
Contact us to update your mailing address if you
- haven’t received your passport and
- are moving within 30 days of submitting your application
If you have a community mailbox, make sure you check it before you contact us about your application.

## When you get your passport
Learn how to keep your passport safe after you get it .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
